name: Machine pinched my finger at work Ogden, how long to file claim?
description: 180 days to notify employer, 1 year to file in Utah—act fast.

mainEntity.name: Machine pinched my finger at work Ogden, how long to file claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days to notify employer, 1 year to file in Utah—act fast.
acceptedAnswer.description: **You have 180 days to notify employer and one year to formally file in Utah, but do it ASAP to avoid denial.** Late reports complicate causation proof, especially for machinery mishaps[1][4]. Deadlines are strict; missing them bars benefits. Document everything now. Attorney can help meet timelines.
